title: MwonMod
description: A mod for the melon king plot by DeepSeaBlue on Diamondfire
body:
mwonmod!

> mwonmod is a lightweight Fabric mod that enhances your Melon King experience by providing configurable overlays, in-game shortcuts, and informational HUD elements :3 ## Features: - Ingame auction timer and flawless NPC spawn timer - A simple toggleable inventory rundown overlay - Keybinds to access `@bank` and `@forge` quickly - Sign upgrade preview tooltips - Improved number rendering - Desktop notifications for ingame events such as monarch change - Performance improvements - Many more QOL features _This mod is made specifically for Melon King on Diamondfire, you likely won't find utility with it otherwise_ _If you have issues or feature requests, please make a github issue or contact me via discord!_
